_description: Parts Inventory — reorder rules, PO templates, stock categories, vendor management

reorder_rules.note: Reorder when quantity on hand hits reorder_point. Target stock = reorder_point × 2.
reorder_rules.note_high_velocity: For parts used >5x per week, carry 3× reorder point to avoid stockouts.

high_velocity_parts: Oil filters (common fitments: Toyota, Honda, Ford, Chevy)
Cabin air filters (top 10 fitments for shop's market)
Shop supplies (gloves, shop towels, zip ties)

primary.label: Primary Supplier
primary.note: First source for all parts orders. Negotiate net-30 terms and volume discounts.

secondary.label: Secondary Supplier
secondary.note: Backup when primary is out of stock or for specialty parts.

dealer.label: OEM Dealer
dealer.note: Use for warranty-required OEM parts or when aftermarket options have high failure rates.
dealer.markup_note: OEM parts typically carry a lower markup % due to higher acquisition cost.

return_policy_defaults.note: Retain cores until credit is confirmed. Never discard a core before supplier confirmation.

low_stock_alert_rules: Trigger alert when quantity drops to or below reorder_point.
Generate a PO suggestion automatically grouping all low-stock items by vendor.
Flag any item at zero stock immediately — escalate to shop manager.
Review high-velocity parts weekly; all other parts monthly.

inventory_audit.note: Shrinkage above 2% warrants investigation (damage, theft, miscounts).
